name: Company Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix rice with melted butter or margarine in the crockpot.
2. Stir to coat the rice thoroughly.
3. Add all remaining ingredients, except slivered almonds and 2 tablespoons of green onions.
4. Stir well.
5. Sprinkle reserved almonds and chopped green onions over the top.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours or High for 3 to 4 hours.
